goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)
has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)

proof: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, x1) }(x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(square_real, x0)
function[T0, T1](x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T0, T1](x1, identity_fn[T0], x2) = x1(x2) }[Real, Real -> Real](Real.mul, x0)
function[T0, T1, T2](x1: T1 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x3) = x1(x2(x3)) }[Real, Real, Real -> Real](Real.mul, identity_fn[Real], x0)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2 = x2 * x1 }(x0, Real.1)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, identity_fn[Real]), x0, square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
has_derivative_at(cube_real, x0, square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

proof: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(cube_real, x0, x1) }(square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(cube_real, x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(cube_real, x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, square_real), x0, square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
has_derivative_at(quartic_real, x0, square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

proof: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(quartic_real, x0, x1) }(square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(quartic_real, x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(quartic_real, x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](square_real, f), x0, (f(x0) * Real.1 + f(x0) * Real.1) * d)
has_derivative_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](cube_real, f), x0, (square_real(f(x0)) * Real.1 + f(x0) * (f(x0) * Real.1 + f(x0) * Real.1)) * d)
has_derivative_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](quartic_real, f), x0, (square_real(f(x0)) * (f(x0) * Real.1 + f(x0) * Real.1) + square_real(f(x0)) * (f(x0) * Real.1 + f(x0) * Real.1)) * d)
